name: Create explicit component variants
description: MEDIUM: create explicit `ThreadComposer` / `EditComposer` / `ForwardComposer` variants instead of one component with many modes/flags.

metadata.intent: Replace implicit modes with explicit self-documenting variants

must_use: Explicit variants composed of shared internals
must_not: One component with many mode props and hidden conditionals
conventions: Each variant should declare its provider/state and the exact UI pieces it renders.

steps.description: Name variants by user intent (Thread/Edit/Forward), not booleans.
Compose shared internal subcomponents; keep each variant small and explicit.
